---
title: "WebR barebones"
engine: knitr
format: live-html
---

{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

A real R session in your browser. Edit the code, then hit **Run Code**.

```{r}
#| include: false
# forces knitr/rmarkdown into manifest.json so Connect Cloud installs them
invisible(1)
```

```{webr}
d <- data.frame(
  x = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6),
  y = c(2, 4, 5, 4, 7, 9)
)
d

plot(d$x, d$y, pch = 19, col = "steelblue", main = "y vs x")
abline(lm(y ~ x, data = d), col = "firebrick", lwd = 2)
```
